articles.title: Target (NYSE: TGT) executive granted shares, portion withheld for taxes
articles.summary: Target executive Melissa K. Kremer received 7,259 shares as part of a performance share unit award under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan. Subsequently, 3,088 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations related to this settlement. After these transactions, Kremer directly holds 72,145 Target shares, indicating a routine compensation event rather than an open-market trade.

Kremer received 7,259 shares as part of a performance share unit award under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan. After these transactions, Kremer directly holds 72,145 Target shares, indicating a routine compensation event rather than an open-market trade.

articles.title: GIFT - Giftify ($GIFT): A Small-Cap Incentives Platform with More ScaleThan Its Valuation Suggests
articles.summary: Giftify (GIFT) is an incentives platform centered around CardCash.com, processing over $154 million in annual transactions within the growing gift card market. Despite its small market capitalization of $35 million, the company reported 27% gross billing growth and profitability in its core CardCash business in fiscal 2025, operating with a lean team and expanding into corporate rewards. The article highlights a potential undervaluation given analyst targets and market size, while also acknowledging risks such as financial viability, dilution, concentration, and NASDAQ compliance issues.
articles.text_to_analyze: GIFT - Giftify ($GIFT): A Small-Cap Incentives Platform with More ScaleThan Its Valuation Suggests. Giftify (GIFT) is an incentives platform centered around CardCash.com, processing over $154 million in annual transactions within the growing gift card market. Despite its small market capitalization of $35 million, the company reported 27% gross billing growth and profitability in its core CardCash business in fiscal 2025, operating with a lean team and expanding into corporate rewards. The article highlights a potential undervaluation given analyst targets and market size, while also acknowledging risks such as financial viability, dilution, concentration, and NASDAQ compliance issues.

articles.title: Target (NYSE: TGT) executive receives 11,250-share award; 5,131 withheld
articles.summary: Target Corporation executive Michael J. Fiddelke received an award of 11,250 shares of common stock on April 7, 2026, as a settlement of a performance share unit under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan. Concurrently, 5,131 shares were withheld at a price of $120.76 per share to cover tax withholding obligations. After these transactions, Fiddelke directly holds 124,790 shares of Target common stock.
articles.text_to_analyze: Target (NYSE: TGT) executive receives 11,250-share award; 5,131 withheld. Target Corporation executive Michael J. Fiddelke received an award of 11,250 shares of common stock on April 7, 2026, as a settlement of a performance share unit under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan. Concurrently, 5,131 shares were withheld at a price of $120.76 per share to cover tax withholding obligations. After these transactions, Fiddelke directly holds 124,790 shares of Target common stock.

articles.title: Target (TGT) CAO boosts deferred stock-linked units in amended Form 4/A
articles.summary: Target Corporation's Chief Accounting Officer, Matthew A. Liegel, increased his holdings of deferred compensation units linked to Target common stock by 3,425.8308 units, as reported in an amended Form 4/A filing. These units, valued at $116.76 each, are part of the company's Executive Deferred Compensation Plan and are economically equivalent to common shares but are paid out in cash. The amendment clarifies the number of units acquired and includes investment earnings/losses since a previous filing, bringing Liegel's total to 7,134.7280 deferred compensation units.

These units, valued at $116.76 each, are part of the company's Executive Deferred Compensation Plan and are economically equivalent to common shares but are paid out in cash. The amendment clarifies the number of units acquired and includes investment earnings/losses since a previous filing, bringing Liegel's total to 7,134.7280 deferred compensation units.

articles.title: Target (TGT) executive gets 2,443-share award, 751 shares withheld for taxes
articles.summary: Target Corporation executive Lisa R. Roath received an award of 2,443 shares of common stock as a settlement of a performance share unit. To cover tax obligations, 751 shares were withheld at a price of $120.76 per share. Following these transactions, Roath directly holds 42,164 Target shares, reflecting a net increase of 1,692 shares.

To cover tax obligations, 411 shares were withheld at $120.76 per share, a routine procedure. After these transactions, Liegel directly holds 13,069 shares of Target common stock.
